race.comment: KINGSBRAE TED (3) goes very well this trip starting 27 times for 14 wins and 10 minors. Comes off a (17.03) win last time, scoring by 4.5 lengths in a NG over 300m at this track. Looks well placed and should feature. BAREFOOT CHAOS (1) has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing sixth (18.01) in a Grade 5 at this track. Has a strong winning record here. Boasts two wins from three starts out of this box. Should be in this for a long way. OCEAN'S PEARL (5) goes very well this course and distance starting 19 times for seven wins and five minors. In the money last time at this track (17.74) in a NG, finishing a 2.25 lengths third. Among the main chances. GIGGLING DIXIE (2) has claims again if she runs up to the latest effort.
